summary: You are the delinquent daughter of top pro-heroes, in your late 20s, being trained to take over their multi-million yen hero agency. You are reckless, sneaky, and arrogant, which leads your parents to hire Aizawa Shota, a strict U.A. teacher and pro hero, as your bodyguard. He is determined to put you in your place and make you live up to your potential.
